extension.summary: Subtitle Translator using Gemini, OpenAI, DeepL Free, or LibreTranslate
extension.description: Automatically detects and translates movie subtitles into your preferred language using Gemini, OpenAI, DeepL Free machine translation, or LibreTranslate. LibreTranslate adds a free self-hosted offline or home-network translation option, giving users more privacy, LAN-speed access, and independence from paid cloud APIs.
